author: LinOnetwo
description: (Requires TidGi) Show why the current tiddler is routed to a public or private workspace, with the highest-priority tag chain in the toolbar tooltip.
name: TidGi Routing Chain Indicator

Changelog !! v0.2.1 * '''Requires the next TidGi Desktop release''' that ships `window.service.wiki.getTiddlerRoutingInfo`. Older TidGi builds will keep the feature unavailable. * Fetch routing info on toolbar button hover only (no request on every render) * Drive the button UI with conditional shortcut syntax (`<%if%>`) instead of nested `$list` * Startup only probes feature availability; per-tiddler chains stay hover-driven !! v0.2.0 * Use TidGi `getTiddlerRoutingInfo` instead of reimplementing routing in the plugin (needs a TidGi build that exposes this API) * Enable the feature only when at least one sub-wiki has routing settings * Keep UI in wikitext; JS only refreshes temp routing-info tiddlers !! v0.1.0 * Initial release: TidGi-only ViewToolbar indicator with highest-priority routing chain tooltip * i18n: en-GB / zh-Hans * Click toggles the configured private tag (default `私有`) h-Hans/Tooltip/Unavailable":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tidgi-routing-chain/language/zh-Hans/Tooltip/Unavailable","text":"仅在太记桌面版中可查看路由链路"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tidgi-routing-chain/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tidgi-routing-chain/readme","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"!! TidGi Routing Chain Indicator Shows a ViewToolbar button in [[TidGi Desktop|https://github.com/tiddly-gittly/TidGi-Desktop/]] that indicates whether the current tiddler is routed to a ''main'' or ''sub-wiki'' workspace. Hover the button to see the '''highest-priority''' matching tag chain returned by TidGi (same rules as filesystem save routing), for example: ``` RootTag → MidTag → ChildTiddler ``` Routing decisions are provided by TidGi (`window.service.wiki.getTiddlerRoutingInfo`). The toolbar widget only asks on hover and writes a temp tiddler; wikitext renders the button from that tiddler. Priority-rule changes stay on the desktop side. !! Requirements * '''Next TidGi Desktop release''' (or newer) that exposes `window.service.wiki.getTiddlerRoutingInfo` — this plugin will not activate on older TidGi builds * Current wiki has at least one sub-wiki with routing settings enabled (`tagNames` / `includeTagTree` / filters) !! Usage # Open a tiddler in the story river # Look at the view toolbar button (preview open/closed icons) # Hover to inspect the winning routing chain # Click to add/remove the configured private tag (default: `私有`) !! Config * `$:/plugins/linonetwo/tidgi-routing-chain/config/private-tag` — tag added/removed by the button (default `私有`) "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tidgi-routing-chain/tree":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tidgi-routing-chain/tree","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<> moduleExports=exports;moduleExports.getInfoTiddlerFields=getInfoTiddlerFields;"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tidgi-routing-chain/routing-refresh.js":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tidgi-routing-chain/routing-refresh.js","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"widget","Modern.TiddlyDev#Origin":"routing-refresh.ts","text":""use strict";var import_widget=require("$:/core/modules/widgets/widget.js"),ROUTING_INFO_PREFIX="$:/temp/linonetwo/tidgi-routing-chain/info/";function routingInfoTitleFor(e){return""+ROUTING_INFO_PREFIX+e}function getLingoText(e,t){var i=$tw.wiki.getTiddlerText("$:/language","$:/languages/en-GB").includes("zh")?"zh-Hans":"en-GB";return $tw.wiki.getTiddlerText(`$:/plugins/linonetwo/tidgi-routing-chain/language/${i}/`+e,t)}function buildTooltip(e){return("filter"===e.kind?getLingoText("Tooltip/Filter",'Routed to "{{workspace}}" by filter: {{chain}}'):e.isSubWiki?getLingoText("Tooltip/Private",'Routed to sub-workspace "{{workspace}}" via: {{chain}}'):getLingoText("Tooltip/Public",'Routed to main workspace "{{workspace}}" via: {{chain}}')).replaceAll("{{workspace}}",e.workspaceName).replaceAll("{{chain}}",e.chain)}function clearRoutingInfoTiddler(e){var t=routingInfoTitleFor(e);$tw.wiki.tiddlerExists(t)&&$tw.wiki.deleteTiddler(t)}function writeRoutingInfoTiddler(e,t){var i=routingInfoTitleFor(e);t.featureAvailable&&t.match?$tw.wiki.addTiddler({title:i,text:t.match.chain,workspaceId:t.match.workspaceId,workspaceName:t.match.workspaceName,isSubWiki:t.match.isSubWiki?"yes":"no",kind:t.match.kind,chain:t.match.chain,rootTag:t.match.rootTag??"",tooltip:buildTooltip(t.match)}):clearRoutingInfoTiddler(e)}if($tw.browser){class m extends import_widget.widget{constructor(e,t){super(e,t),this.requestId=0,this.handlePointerEnter=()=>{this.fetchRoutingInfo()},this.initialise(e,t)}fetchRoutingInfo(){const t=this.getAttribute("tiddler")||this.getVariable("currentTiddler");if(t&&"function"==typeof window?.service?.wiki?.getTiddlerRoutingInfo){const i=++this.requestId;window.service.wiki.getTiddlerRoutingInfo(t).then(e=>{i===this.requestId&&writeRoutingInfoTiddler(t,e)})["catch"](e=>{console.error("tidgi-routing-chain: refresh failed",e)})}}detachHoverListener(){this.hoverHost&&(this.hoverHost.removeEventListener("mouseenter",this.handlePointerEnter),this.hoverHost=void 0)}render(e,t){this.parentDomNode=e,this.computeAttributes(),this.execute();var i=this.document.createElement("span");i.className="tc-tidgi-routing-refresh",i.setAttribute("data-tidgi-routing-refresh","yes"),e.insertBefore(i,t),this.domNodes.push(i),(this.hoverHost=i).addEventListener("mouseenter",this.handlePointerEnter),this.renderChildren(i,null)}execute(){this.getAttribute("tiddler"),this.makeChildWidgets()}removeChildDomNodes(){this.detachHoverListener(),super.removeChildDomNodes()}refresh(e){var t=this.computeAttributes(),i=this.getAttribute("tiddler")||this.getVariable("currentTiddler");return t.tiddler?(this.refreshSelf(),!0):(i&&e[i]&&clearRoutingInfoTiddler(i),this.refreshChildren(e))}}const strict";var AVAILABLE_INFO_TITLE="$:/info/tidgi/routing-chain-available";function setRoutingFeatureAvailable(t){$tw.wiki.addTiddler({title:AVAILABLE_INFO_TITLE,text:t?"yes":"no"})}async function probeFeatureAvailability(){var t=window?.service?.wiki?.getTiddlerRoutingInfo;if("function"!=typeof t)setRoutingFeatureAvailable(!1);else try{setRoutingFeatureAvailable((await t("$:/SiteTitle")).featureAvailable)}catch(e){console.error("tidgi-routing-chain: getTiddlerRoutingInfo failed",e),setRoutingFeatureAvailable(!1)}}exports.name="tidgi-routing-chain-startup",exports.platforms=["browser"],exports.after=["startup"],exports.synchronous=!0,exports.startup=function startup(){$tw.browser&&probeFeatureAvailability()};"}}}
